key_learnings: The unified SDK `@google/genai` does strictly not expose an `ai.corpora` API at the root level, unlike earlier specialized or beta SDKs for Vertex AI.
Synchronous RAG insertions using missing SDK endpoints will throw undefined property errors regardless of whether TypeScript strictness is suppressed.
Isolating alpha/beta RAG injection queries behind granular `try...catch` blocks prevents non-fatal (secondary) storage operations from crashing primary evaluation pipelines.
outcomes.patterns_observed: The node failed solely because `commitTheorem` returned false. The root cause was an uncaught exception hitting a missing SDK wrapper (`ai.corpora.documents.create`). By correctly isolating this secondary sync into a handled bypass catch, the main pipeline persists logic shifts safely to cold storage and continues.
